name: Apex
subtitle: The Apex riding companion
description: Official source for Apex — a motorcycle riding companion.

apps.name: Apex
apps.subtitle: Record your rides. Keep every corner.
apps.localizedDescription:
Apex is a motorcycle riding companion. Record your rides and get them back as beautiful keepsakes — route, distance, duration, and top speed for every ride you carve.

Tap “Try Demo Mode” on first launch to explore with sample rides before your first ride.

versions.localizedDescription: Live Recording — record a ride on a real dark map. Your route draws over actual streets as you go, with a live distance / time / speed HUD and big Start/Finish controls for gloved thumbs.
First AltStore release: Ride Library + demo mode (tap Try Demo Mode to explore).

privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Apex records your route while you ride.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Apex records your route while you ride, even with the screen off.
